parameters.name: input_file
parameters.description: Path to eDNA match data CSV

parameters.name: min_score
parameters.description: Minimum percent identity score for consensus assignment

parameters.name: max_gap
parameters.description: Maximum score gap allowed between top hits before collapsing to higher rank

parameters.name: rank_thresholds
parameters.description: Minimum score required to assign at each taxonomic rank

parameters.name: geographic_hint
parameters.description: Geographic context for LLM ecological inference

parameters.name: habitat_scheme
parameters.description: Habitat classification scheme; NULL uses default 3-category scheme (Marine/Freshwater/Terrestrial)

parameters.name: target_group
parameters.description: Taxonomic target group for LLM review

parameters.name: llm_fn
parameters.description: LLM function reference for API calls
